title: String plus interval result in program errors upon comparison
poc: select cast('1970-01-01 11:00' as timestamp) = '1970-01-01 11:00' - interval '600' second;
key_bug_features: String and interval comparison causes program errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time, description) VALUES (1, '1970-01-01 11:00', 'Initial event');
SELECT event_time, event_time - INTERVAL '600' SECOND AS adjusted_time FROM test_dates WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM test_dates WHERE event_time = CAST('1970-01-01 11:00' AS TIMESTAMP) - INTERVAL '600' SECOND;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NULL OR event_time > '1970-01-01 10:00';
